title: Order Placement and Payment Flow
interaction_flow: alt [session null] OrderServlet → Customer: redirect to login.jsp?message=Session Expired
alt [cartItems.size() == 0] OrderServiceImpl → OrderServlet: return 'Order Placement Failed!'
loop [for each CartBean item in cartItems]
OrderServiceImpl → OrderBean: new OrderBean(transactionId, prodId, quantity, price*qty)
OrderServiceImpl → Database: INSERT INTO orders(transid, prodid, quantity, amount, shipped=0)
alt [addOrder success] OrderServiceImpl → CartServiceImpl: removeAProduct(userId, prodId)
alt [removeAProduct success] OrderServiceImpl → ProductServiceImpl: sellNProduct(prodId, quantity)
OrderServiceImpl → Database: INSERT INTO transactions(transid, username, time, amount)
OrderServiceImpl → MailMessage: transactionSuccess(userName, firstName, transId, transAmount)
MailMessage → JavaMailUtil: sendMail(recipient, subject='Order Placed at Ellison Electronics', htmlBody)
OrderServlet → Customer: HTML page with JS injecting status message into #message element
key_relationships: OrderServiceImpl instantiates CartServiceImpl, ProductServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl (direct new)
OrderServiceImpl calls addOrder(OrderBean) and addTransaction(TransactionBean) on itself (self-call via new OrderServiceImpl())
OrderServiceImpl and TransServiceImpl both use DBUtil.provideConnection() for DB access
TransServiceImpl implements TransService; provides getUserId(transId) — used elsewhere, not in this flow
OrderBean: fields transactionId, productId, quantity, amount, shipped(int)

data_objects.CartBean: userId, prodId, quantity (fetched from DB via CartServiceImpl)

db_operations: INSERT INTO orders(transid, prodid, quantity, amount, shipped) — per cart item
INSERT INTO transactions(transid, username, time, amount) — once after all orders saved
important_notes: OrderServlet handles both GET and POST (doPost delegates to doGet)
Session check on 'username' + 'password' attributes; redirect on null
The loop breaks immediately on any failure (addOrder, removeAProduct, or sellNProduct)
addTransaction is called ONCE after all cart items processed successfully
Confirmation email sent only when addTransaction succeeds
JavaMailUtil uses smtp.gmail.com:587 with STARTTLS; credentials from application.properties ResourceBundle
Response: orderDetails.jsp included via RequestDispatcher; status injected via inline JS into element #message
TransServiceImpl.getUserId() is NOT part of this flow — it's a separate utility
